data.headline: Olivier Marchetti — International Sales Director
data.tagline: Connecting global buyers with Miami's finest properties.

items.title: Global Buyer Network
items.description: Trilingual in English, French, and Italian — connecting European and South American buyers with Miami's premier properties.

items.title: Cross-Border Transactions
items.description: Expert guidance on international purchasing structures, visa considerations, and foreign national financing.

items.title: Relocation Concierge
items.description: Full-service relocation support — from neighborhood tours to school enrollment and lifestyle orientation.

data.title: Explore Miami Properties
data.subtitle: Connect with Olivier for a private consultation.

data.bio: Olivier Marchetti brings a decade of international luxury real estate experience to Prestige Properties. Trilingual in English, French, and Italian, he serves a global clientele seeking premier residences in Miami's most exclusive neighborhoods. Before real estate, Olivier spent five years in international private banking in Geneva.
